events.title: Microsoft Teams: Ad-hoc room reservation from Teams Rooms on Windows console
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Teams: Ad-hoc room reservation from Teams Rooms on Windows console
events.summary: With Teams Rooms on Windows consoles, you can quickly book a meeting room for immediate use, helping to avoid scheduling conflicts and ensure uninterrupted spontaneous meetings. Available in Teams Rooms Pro-licensed rooms.
events.summaryJa: With Teams Rooms on Windows consoles, you can quickly book a meeting room for immediate use, helping to avoid scheduling conflicts and ensure uninterrupted spontaneous meetings. Available in Teams Rooms Pro-licensed rooms.
events.summaryEn: With Teams Rooms on Windows consoles, you can quickly book a meeting room for immediate use, helping to avoid scheduling conflicts and ensure uninterrupted spontaneous meetings. Available in Teams Rooms Pro-licensed rooms.
events.importanceReason: 今後の展開計画や事前準備に影響するため / ライセンス設計や展開判断に直結するため

events.title: Microsoft Teams: BYOD space peripheral health signals and reports in the Pro Management portal
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Teams: BYOD space peripheral health signals and reports in the Pro Management portal
events.summary: Admins can proactively manage peripherals in bring your own device (BYOD) rooms and desks with reports in the Pro Management portal that now flag if devices are faulty, undetectable by a PC, missing, or moved. Reports in the Pro Management portal require a Teams Shared Devices license for the room, and reports for des...

events.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention to prevent Microsoft 365 Copilot processing content with sensitivity labels supports all storage locations
events.titleJa: Purview DLP で Copilot の機密データ保護を強化
events.titleEn: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention to prevent Microsoft 365 Copilot processing content with sensitivity labels supports all storage locations
events.summary: The Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention policy to restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot processing sensitive files in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint will now apply regardless of file storage location.
events.summaryJa: The Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention policy to restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot processing sensitive files in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint will now apply regardless of file storage location.
events.summaryEn: The Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention policy to restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot processing sensitive files in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint will now apply regardless of file storage location.

events.title: OneDrive: Discover Copilot actions in File Preview
events.titleJa: ファイル プレビューで Copilot アクション提案を表示
events.titleEn: OneDrive: Discover Copilot actions in File Preview
events.summary: See what Copilot can do the moment you preview a file in OneDrive or SharePoint. Ready-to-use prompts appear alongside the Copilot button, helping you summarize documents, generate FAQs, and more — all without writing a single prompt.
events.summaryJa: See what Copilot can do the moment you preview a file in OneDrive or SharePoint. Ready-to-use prompts appear alongside the Copilot button, helping you summarize documents, generate FAQs, and more — all without writing a single prompt.

events.title: Microsoft Teams: Express voice enrollment in Microsoft Teams
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Teams: Express voice enrollment in Microsoft Teams
events.summary: Express voice enrollment makes registering your voice in Teams fast and easy. Your profile enables features like voice isolation, speaker recognition, identification in a meeting room and transcripts, and enhanced meeting recaps and insights from Microsoft 365 Copilot. If you haven't enrolled, you’ll get an in-product...

events.title: Outlook: View, edit & share Copilot Pages with Outlook for Android
events.titleJa: Outlook モバイルで Copilot Pages の閲覧・編集・共有に対応
events.titleEn: Outlook: View, edit & share Copilot Pages with Outlook for Android
events.summary: Users can now view, edit and share Copilot Pages with Outlook for Android, making it easier to continue working with Copilot and colleagues while on the go.

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Chat in Outlook expands to reason over inbox, calendar, and enterprise data
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Chat in Outlook expands to reason over inbox, calendar, and enterprise data
events.summary: Copilot Chat in Outlook expanding to support reasoning over a user's entire inbox, calendar and other enterprise data for Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat users (without a Microsoft 365 Copilot license) .
events.summaryJa: Copilot Chat in Outlook expanding to support reasoning over a user's entire inbox, calendar and other enterprise data for Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat users (without a Microsoft 365 Copilot license) .

events.titleEn: SharePoint: Chat one-on-one with SharePoint agents in Teams
events.summary: Users can chat one-on-one with a SharePoint agent directly within Teams chat.
